name: Popeye's Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients together well until smooth.
2. Dip hand into just enough more Bisquick that you'll knead dough until elastic, like bread dough.
3. Shape into 4 patties each 1 inch thick, placing close together in greased baking pan.
4. Bake at 450°F for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown and doubled in size.
5. Cool in pan or rack for 10 minutes.
